name: io.github.oktopeak/mycase-mcp
description: Connect Claude to MyCase with 18 tools for cases, contacts, documents, tasks, calendar, calls, time entries, billing, and staff.

environmentVariables.name: MYCASE_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: MyCase OAuth client ID issued by MyCase support for your firm

environmentVariables.name: MYCASE_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: MyCase OAuth client secret issued by MyCase support

environmentVariables.name: ENCRYPTION_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. 64-character hex key for encrypting stored OAuth tokens. If omitted, a key is auto-generated on first run and stored in the OS keychain (macOS Keychain / Linux Secret Service / Windows Credential Manager).

environmentVariables.name: MYCASE_REDIRECT_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Local port for the OAuth callback listener (default: 5678). Must match the redirect URI registered with MyCase support.

environmentVariables.name: MYCASE_EXPERIMENTAL_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to enable experimental tools (log-call) whose API endpoints are unverified.
